userMessage: Enable FastFrame 100 frames single sequence then save CH1 waveform

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Generated Flow","description":"Common TekAutomate scope flow built server-side.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"2","type":"group","label":"Configure acquisition/save","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"2_1","type":"write","label":"Configure acquisition/save (1/2)","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence"}},{"id":"2_2","type":"write","label":"Configure acquisition/save (2/2)","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STATE ON"}}]},{"id":"3","type":"write","label":"Configure horizontal","params":{"command":"HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE ON;HORizontal:FASTframe:COUNt 100"}},{"id":"4","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH1 waveform","params":{"source":"CH1","filename":"ch1.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"5","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
